scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru and Nerissa Ravencroft performing "Sayonara no Mae ni" (Before Goodbye).
Kobo Kanaeru performing her original song "Closing".

subtitles.original: 二人を彩るこの街並み
subtitles.english: These city streets that color the two of us

subtitles.original: 部屋の中は香水代わりのソフィアのフレーバー
subtitles.english: The room is filled with Sophia's flavor instead of perfume

subtitles.original: 当たり前さえも奇跡
subtitles.english: Even the ordinary is a miracle

subtitles.original: 当たり障れない君との軌跡
subtitles.english: The harmless path with you

subtitles.original: どれだけ恋知っても 越えられない君を
subtitles.english: No matter how much love I know, I can't surpass you

subtitles.original: 今ならわかる気がして
subtitles.english: I feel like I understand now

subtitles.original: 今から過去にも戻れるなら
subtitles.english: If I could go back to the past from now

subtitles.original: サヨナラの前に キスをして
subtitles.english: Before the goodbye, give me a kiss

subtitles.original: サヨナラの後は 忘れさせて
subtitles.english: After the goodbye, let me forget

subtitles.original: でも あなたの名前が 消えない
subtitles.english: But your name won't fade away

subtitles.original: 離れない 離さない 戻りたい
subtitles.english: Won't leave, won't let go, want to go back

subtitles.original: Take me free
subtitles.english: Take me free

subtitles.original: 呪いたいほど 愛しているのよ
subtitles.english: I love you so much it's like a curse

subtitles.original: 気づけば あなたのことばかり浮かべて
subtitles.english: Before I know it, I'm only thinking of you

subtitles.original: 明日になれば 大丈夫
subtitles.english: If tomorrow comes it'll be fine

subtitles.original: 何度言い聞かせればいいの
subtitles.english: How many times do I have to tell myself?

subtitles.original: 愛という沼に 溺れてる
subtitles.english: I'm drowning in a swamp called love

subtitles.original: 私の声は 届くかな
subtitles.english: Will my voice reach you?

subtitles.english: While embracing the unchanging days

subtitles.original: Closing
subtitles.english: Closing

subtitles.original: Lyrics: 下川美帆、満田尚子 Music: 下川美帆
subtitles.english: Lyrics: Miho Shimokawa, Naoko Mitsuda Music: Miho Shimokawa

subtitles.original: いつか そう いつか
subtitles.english: Someday, yes, someday

subtitles.original: 弱い心が 捕まる前に
subtitles.english: Before my weak heart gets caught

subtitles.original: そっと あなたを遠ざけた
subtitles.english: I gently pushed you away

subtitles.original: ああ こんな気持ち
subtitles.english: Ah, this feeling

subtitles.original: 辛すぎるよ もう
subtitles.english: It's just too painful

subtitles.original: あなたは 誰なの?
subtitles.english: Who are you?

subtitles.original: どこに 隠れてたの?
subtitles.english: Where were you hiding?

subtitles.original: ひどく 怯えてる
subtitles.english: I'm terribly afraid

subtitles.original: 俯いたままの
subtitles.english: Still looking down

subtitles.original: 見送るな 私が
subtitles.english: Don't see me off, I...

subtitles.original: 願ってた
subtitles.english: ...was wishing

subtitles.original: またあの季節 夜空は白く
subtitles.english: That season again, the night sky is white

subtitles.original: あなたも いて
subtitles.english: You are there too

subtitles.original: 触れてこないで 嬉しいけど
subtitles.english: Don't touch me, I'm happy but...

subtitles.original: 心が 痛い
subtitles.english: ...my heart hurts

subtitles.original: 離したくない 離れたくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to let go, I don't want to leave

subtitles.original: でも 諦めてた
subtitles.english: But I had given up

subtitles.original: もうこれ以上 好きになれない
subtitles.english: I can't love you any more than this

subtitles.original: 失う痛み 耐えきれないよ
subtitles.english: I can't bear the pain of losing you

subtitles.original: 変えない日々 抱きしめたまま
subtitles.english: While embracing the unchanging days

subtitles.original: いつか そう いつか
subtitles.english: Someday, yes, someday

subtitles.original: ただそばにいて それだけでいい
subtitles.english: Just be by my side, that's all I need

subtitles.original: 素直にはなれないけれど
subtitles.english: Though I can't be honest with you
